gaps: AI/machine learning training use not addressed
Public transaction note visibility and privacy controls not detailed
label_notes: Source: training knowledge (live fetch blocked). Venmo is a social payment app owned by PayPal with unique privacy consideration: transaction notes can be publicly visible by default. Collects significant social connection data. Does not sell data to third parties, but shares with advertising partners. Minimum age 18 (stricter than COPPA). Notable gap: public/private transaction note settings should be prominently disclosed.
